task: Can you help me write a short message to my coach about being late to practice one day this week? I want it to sound respectful, but not long or fancy.

turns.agent_response:
Of course — here’s a short, respectful option:

**Hi Coach, I wanted to let you know I may be late to practice one day this week because of a scheduling issue. I’ll make sure to get there as soon as I can. Thank you for understanding.**

If you want, I can also make it sound a little more casual or even shorter.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and respectful, not too much.
